class.name: PLYLoader
class.brief_description: Loader for PLY (Polygon File Format) files containing Gaussian splat data.
class.description: PLYLoader reads PLY files, the standard interchange format for Gaussian Splatting, and produces a [GaussianData] resource. It supports ASCII, binary little-endian, and binary big-endian PLY encodings. Required PLY vertex properties are: [code]x, y, z[/code] (position), [code]f_dc_0, f_dc_1, f_dc_2[/code] (base color spherical harmonic DC term), [code]scale_0, scale_1, scale_2[/code] (log-encoded scale), [code]rot_0, rot_1, rot_2, rot_3[/code] (rotation quaternion in WXYZ order), and [code]opacity[/code] (logit-encoded). Optional properties include surface normals ([code]nx, ny, nz[/code]) and higher-order spherical harmonic coefficients ([code]f_rest_*[/code]). Scale values are stored as log-scale (actual = exp(stored)) and opacity as logit (actual = sigmoid(stored)), matching the conventions from the original 3D Gaussian Splatting paper. The loader implements an on-disk cache to accelerate repeated loads of unchanged files.

method.name: load_file
method.description: Loads a PLY file from the given filesystem path. Returns [constant OK] on success. After loading, retrieve the result with [method get_gaussian_data].

method.name: get_gaussian_data
method.description: Returns the [GaussianData] resource produced by the most recent [method load_file] call, or [code]null[/code] if no file has been loaded.

method.name: get_splat_count
method.description: Returns the number of Gaussian splats parsed from the loaded PLY file.

method.name: get_load_statistics
method.description: Returns a dictionary of load performance statistics including header parse time, data parse time, cache hit status, and total load time in microseconds.

method.name: has_property
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the parsed PLY header contains a vertex property with the given name.

method.name: get_property_names
method.description: Returns the names of all vertex properties found in the PLY header.
